creator: sahil@tandon.net
text:
- Mark BROKEN: does not build after libevent update to 1.4.13

How-To-Repeat: - Update devel/libevent to 1.4.13 and try to build; it will fail because event_gotsig and event_sigcb are no longer defined/supported by libevent.  Se pointyhat log for more:
http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/i386-errorlogs/e.8.20091209110328/vomit-0.2c_6.log
